steps.title: Identify the subject
steps.content: The subject is collection (singular). The prepositional phrase “of oil paintings” and the relative clause “which includes...” are modifiers that don't affect the subject's number.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content:
Subject-verb agreement requires that the verb match the subject in number. Because collection is singular, only remains (singular) is correct; the other three options are plural verb forms.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
